title: Let the Stalking Begin !!!
description: Here is an easy one. Go through the website and start finding the flag. The flag is divided into three parts in all three of the DSC cores (CTF Organizers) Linkedin accounts. Find all three of them and enter the flag.
clues: Go through Mohit's about section to find the first part of the flag.
Zaid's linkedin profile has something written in his skills section
Look at Shriya's education to find the third part of the flag.

title: JavaPass

title: 1nsp3ct0r

Why is only one link in the Nav bar not working 🤔
leme see where the other links go to.

title: Important Message
description: We intercepted an important audio transmission that contains a secret message! The file Important Message.wav seems to contain some kind of coded communication.
question: wrap the message in the flag format: ritCTF{message_here}
clues: Listen carefully to the audio file. Do you hear a pattern of short and long beeps?
The audio contains Morse code! Try searching for morse code audio decoder online.

title: The Script of Pratz
description: A mysterious Halloween manuscript has been discovered in the archives of an ancient library. The scholars who created it encoded their secrets using various classical ciphers to protect them from prying eyes.
clues: The main page (/) contains all the important clues you need. Read carefully - it explicitly tells you which cipher is used for each part.
